resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def arrangeWords(self, text: str) -> str:
        words = text.split()
        words[0] = words[0].lower()
        words.sort(key=lambda x: (len(x), words.index(x)))
        words[0] = words[0].capitalize()
        return ' '.join(words)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Sort the words by length and original order, then capitalize the first word and join them back into a string.
